title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the 1[Banaras] Hindu University Act, 1915. (2) It shall come into force on such date2 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, direct.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 55 of 1951, s. 2, for "Benares" (w.e.f. 3-11-1951). 2. 1st April, 1916, see Gazette of India, 1916, Pt. I. P. 352.
